title: Miami Heat Wave
lead: Miami is experiencing a critical heat wave with a Z-Score of +4.43. This extreme weather event has a Score of 10.0/10, indicating severe conditions.
body:
The current heat wave in Miami has reached critical levels, with a Z-Score of +4.43, indicating a significant deviation from normal temperatures. 
 The Cooling Degree Days (CDD) is at 14.5 GG, while the Heating Degree Days (HDD) is at 0.0 GG, showing the extreme heat. 
 The humidity is at 43% and the wind speed is at 5.1 km/h, exacerbating the heat wave conditions.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately to ensure public safety.
